topics.title: Benjamin Button Musical Finds Its New York Cast With Tony Nominee Andrew Durand In Title Role
topics.primaryEntity: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button
entities: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button (musical)
topics.angle: Tony nominee Andrew Durand cast in title role for North American premiere of 'Benjamin Button' musical.

sources.headline: Benjamin Button Musical Finds Its New York Cast With Tony Nominee Andrew Durand In Title Role
sources.summary: The stage musical adaptation of The Curious Case of Benjamin Button will make its North American premiere Off Broadway at the Public Theater this fall, with Dead Outlaw Tony nominee Andrew Durand taking the title role. Full casting of the production, which begins previews October 8, opens October 21 and runs through November 15, has [ ]

sources.headline: Chris Brown Pleads Guilty To Affray Over UK Nightclub Confrontation
sources.summary: Chris Brown has pleaded guilty to affray following a confrontation in a London nightclub in 2023. According to BBC News, the singer entered his plea at Southwark Crown Court in a hearing that took less than five minutes. The incident took place in a London nightclub in Mayfair.
